personas.name: Daily driver user
personas.description: A busy user who relies on the app as part of their daily ritual and needs to use it within a short time window
goals: Easily access all features of the application
Go through the same similar sequence of steps each time they use the app
pain_points: Problems with accessing account and logging in
Long downtimes where app is in accessible
Not being sure how to navigate user interface
context: User only has 15 minutes during their lunch to go through wellness exercises
User uses the app to help with morning meditation before the kids wake up
constraints: Application must enable user to recover password within 2 minutes of requesting password recovery
The app launch time shall not exceed 2 seconds on standard devices that application is designed to run on
The application shall preserve a consistent layout and navigation structure across sessions
The system shall remember user preferences and last used settings
Previously used activity shall be accessible via a one-tap shortcut

personas.name: Human connection seeker user
personas.description: A user who uses the app to feel like they're having a conversation with a real person
goals: Receive thoughtful realistic responses relevant responses to their concerns
Feel like their concerns are being heard and addressed
context: Venting frustrations to get through a bad day
constraints: Chatbot must not provide the same response twice since application initiation, unless explicitly asked to
Chatbot must acknowledge and/or address at least one idea brought up by user
Chatbot shall identify and acknowledge the user's emotional state in each interaction
Responses shall use natural, conversational language rather than overly formal or robotic phrasing
Responses shall include at least one empathetic statement when negative sentiment is detected
The chatbot must provide an answer to all questions in any given user message, unless providing an answer compromises the user's safety

personas.name: Analytical user
personas.description: A user who wants to keep track of and analyze their mental health progress
goals: Have access to data and analytics regarding their mental health
Keep a journal/log of their mental health journey
pain_points: Not being able to look at past conversations and information
Having limited options for analyzing progress
context: Using the app to analyze user's mental health emprically
Looking back to see how mental health has progressed
constraints: App shall save all conversations since application account was initiated in an accessible form
All logged data shall be stored without loss and remain accessible across sessions
Data entries shall include timestamps and contextual metadata (e.g mood, activity type)
Application shall provide charts and graphs illustrating mental health progress
User shall be able to search past conversations and journal entries using keywords

personas.name: Neurodivergent user
personas.description: A user who is neurodivergent seeking mental health help from the app
goals: Learn exercises and insights on their mental health in the context of neurodivergenve
Feel that their experience as a neurodivergent person is seen
pain_points: Content that does not reflect neurodivergent experience
Instructions that are vauge or ambiguous
context: Using the app during moments of overstimulation
Looking for structured guidance to regulate emotions
Trying to understand their mental health in a neurodivergent context
constraints: Content shall include perspectives and language relevant to neurodivergent experiences
The system shall avoid framing neurodivergence as a deficit or problem to be fixed
Users shall be able to adjust content complexity (simple vs detailed explanation)
Instructions shall be clear , explicit, and broken into step-by-step guidance
Each screen shall focus on a single primary task

personas.name: Stressed out user
personas.description: A stressed out user who uses the app to calm themselves down
goals: Go through meditation exercises that are easy to perform
Expose themselves to pleasant visual and auditory aesthetics
pain_points: User interface that is hard to navigate
User interface with harsh, jarring aesthetics
context: Looking for meditation exercies while having anxiety attack
Looking to interact with pleasant chatbot to vent
constraints: Meditation exercises shall be accessible within 3 clicks after login
Interface color palette shall avoid high-constrast, and overly saturated colors
Animations shall be smooth and slow-paced, with no flashing or rapid movement
Chatbot responses shall use calm, supportive and non-judgemental language
The system shall display no more than three options per screen
